strategy: Hit with Storm or Death (he takes +30% from both) and avoid Fire and Myth (45% resist). He cannot be stunned.
He puts a Heal-over-Time on himself every round and revives at full health if killed while it is active, so raw damage alone will not finish him.
On Round 4, and on any revive, he hands your team a Skeletal Pirate (Tier 2b) card. Keep it.
Cast that Skeletal Pirate on Nethellnax to strip all his Heal-over-Time and shut off the HoT cheat, which kills the revive. Dr. Von's Monster or Primal Stampede do the same.
With the HoT gone, stack Storm or Death blades and traps and kill him for good.
cheatNotes: He self-casts a Heal-over-Time every round; on its own it is minor, but it powers his revive.
As long as that HoT is ticking, defeating him just revives him at full health, so you must remove it before the killing blow.
At the start of Round 4 and on every revive he gives your team a Skeletal Pirate (Tier 2b) card; hold onto it.
Cast that Skeletal Pirate on him to wipe every HoT and permanently stop the heal cheat; do this, then kill him.
Other HoT-strippers like Dr. Von's Monster or Primal Stampede shut off the same cheat if you do not have the card ready.
